【Day 5】Wrecked on My First CS Match! From Internet Café to Understanding IPs
Code Review of My Youth - From the BIOS Beep to Software Engineering

In elementary school, a classmate dragged me into an internet café and I played CS for the first time — and got wrecked. From not knowing how to connect, to my first time hearing "type in the IP", this is the lesson that took me from single-player into the networked world.
